title: × Espostocactus erectispinus
taxonomy: × Espostocactus erectispinus is a hybrid cactus species within the family Cactaceae. It is a cross between Espostoa and Mammillaria genera, but more specifically, it belongs to the subfamily Opuntioideae and tribe Cacteae. × Espostocactus erectispinus is native to South America, and its classification as a hybrid cactus reflects its unique characteristics and growth habits. The classification of × Espostocactus erectispinus is subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of cactus taxonomy. As a hybrid species, its classification is not strictly binomial, reflecting its complex genetic background.
